tools_used: curl + pypdf (BIO fetch from supremecourt.gov docket link)
helpful: Provisioned full petition text made the QP/vehicle analysis cheap
statpack paid-vs-IFP and relist/CVSG cuts gave a usable calibration anchor
gaps: The BIO was on the docket (filed Jul 15) but not provisioned; fetching it changed the prediction materially (it revealed the Third Amended Complaint vehicle problem)
fedcourts query --topic returned zero rows for every topic tried (qualified immunity, excessive force, 1983) — topic retrieval seems ineffective on the current corpus
A CFR (response requested) cut in the statpack would help; it is the single biggest signal on this docket and I had to price it from general knowledge
notes: Forward cell. Untargeted query (no --topic) does work, so the corpus path is healthy; the topic index appears to be the gap.
